narrative:
Trimble Township (precinct in Athens County) has 1,075 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.4 percentage points.
